profile.name: Christel
profile.bio: Loves cooking, sharing life, and expressing feelings. First Cookbook user.

recentDishes.title: Bread Rolls (Cheese, Hotdog & Bell Pepper)
recentDishes.feedback: Easy to make — spread ketchup on bread, add ingredients, roll, dip in egg, coat in breadcrumbs, fry on low heat.

recentDishes.title: Chicken Adobo
substitutions: used chicken thighs instead of breast
recentDishes.feedback: Classic comfort food. Soy sauce, vinegar, garlic, bay leaves.

recentDishes.title: Butter Garlic Shrimp
recentDishes.feedback: Quick and delicious. Fresh shrimp from the market.

recentDishes.title: Beef Mechado
substitutions: used tomato sauce instead of paste
recentDishes.feedback: Hearty meal. Slow cooked for tenderness.

recentDishes.title: Lumpia
recentDishes.feedback: Family recipe. Ground pork, carrots, green beans.

recipes.name: Chicken Adobo
recipes.instructions: Marinate chicken in soy sauce and vinegar. Brown in pan. Add garlic, bay leaves, pepper. Simmer 30 min.

entries.text: Made lumpia today with green beans instead of cabbage. Turned out really good! Family loved it.
Cooked butter garlic shrimp and beef mechado. Two dishes in one day! Feeling productive.

trips.name: Philippines 2026
trips.vibe: Chill romantic — mostly home, cooking, Jordan visiting
